keyPoints: Mixed-initiative patterns balancing AI initiative with human control to maximize psychological safety, equity, and collaboration quality.
Visible AI explanations, provenance, and attribution to support trust and accountability.
Explicit turn-taking design and prompts to surface quieter teammates and track contributions.
Phase-aware AI involvement aligned to ideation stages to sustain exploration and critical evaluation.
Private collaboration spaces and clear ownership logs to protect ideas and surface provenance.
Governance and ethics checks with ongoing monitoring of safety, equity, and collaboration quality.
Longitudinal mixed-method evaluation using standardized metrics across safety, equity, and collaboration.
